sections.heading: XAT Admit Card 2026 Expected Soon xatonline.in Direct Download Link Here

content.text: XAT Admit Card 2026: XLRI Jamshedpur is expected to release the admit card for the Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT) 2026 soon on the official website xatonline.in. Candidates who have registered for the exam will be able to download their XAT 2026 admit card online once it is made available.
XAT MBA/PGDM Hall Ticket 2026 Expected Soon @ xatonline.in

Latest Update: XLRI Jamshedpur is expected to release the MBA/PGDM Admit Card 2026 for the Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT) 2026 soon on the official website xatonline.in. Registered candidates will be able to download their XAT hall ticket online once released. The admit card will contain important details such as exam date, exam time, test centre, and reporting instructions.

sections.heading: XAT MBA/PGDM Admit Card 2026 - Quick Overview
How to Download XAT Admit Card 2026?

content.text: Open your web browser and go to the official website: xatonline.in
On the homepage, look for the link that says "Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT) 2026 Admit Card" or "Download Hall Ticket". This is usually in the "Latest Announcements" or "Examinations" section.
Click on the "Download Admit Card" or "Submit" button. Your admit card will appear on the screen. Carefully verify all details including:
Save the admit card as a PDF file on your device and take 2-3 printouts. Keep them safely for the exam day.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on XAT Admit Card 2026

items: Check exam center location on Google Maps
Plan to reach 30-45 minutes before reporting time
Keep admit card and ID proof in a clear folder
Follow all instructions given by the invigilators
No use of mobile phones or electronic devices
Do not communicate with other candidates
Raise your hand if you need any assistance
